title: Executive Order 10883—Termination of the Air Coordinating Committee

flags.justification: This terminates a coordinating committee; it does not create new authority.
A clear, specific termination with an explicit sixty-day effective-date delay and a named official responsible for winding up affairs.
A termination action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A one-time termination action, not an ongoing authority grant.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed; a routine agency wind-down.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
No competing second agency's mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. A clean termination with a sensible sixty-day wind-down provision.
